name: mad-skills
description: Battle-tested Claude Code skills. Built from shipping real things, not reading docs.

plugins.name: aws-marketplace
plugins.description: Publish paid container products to AWS Marketplace — entity model, 14-step creation sequence, ECR pipeline, pricing, CloudFormation, review process, and post-launch operations

plugins.name: architect-diagram
plugins.description: Generate clean cloud architecture diagrams from natural language or YAML specs — AWS/GCP/Azure with VPC/AZ/subnet/ECS/K8s nesting, hybrid on-prem/cloud topologies, and proper cloud provider icons

plugins.name: docsearch
plugins.description: Semantic search over a local document archive (PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Markdown) using ChromaDB and any OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint — incremental indexing, metadata filtering, JSON output for agent use
